locations.name: The Iron Gates
locations.title: The Valley's Entrance
locations.detail: Enormous iron gates flanked by crumbling statues. They opened as the party approached. When they looked back, the gates had closed. There is no leaving.

locations.name: Death House
locations.title: The Durst Mansion
locations.detail: A pristine manor on the Svalich Road that pulled the party inside and refused to let them leave. The Durst cult used it as an offering box for Strahd. The altar demanded a sacrifice. The party refused. The Shambling Mound chose not to follow them out.
locations.region: Svalich Road, east of the village

locations.name: Village of Barovia
locations.title: The Silent Village
locations.detail: The only settlement the party has spent time in. Shuttered windows, bolted doors, and a population that has learned to disappear at the sound of hooves. The burgomaster is dead. The church still stands.

locations.name: Burgomaster's Mansion
locations.title: Kolyan's House
locations.detail: Claw marks in the doors. Gouges in the shutters. Tracks in the mud that don't belong to anything natural. Kolyan Indirovich is buried. Ireena had a bag packed. The house is empty now.

locations.name: Church of the Morninglord
locations.title: Father Donavich's Church
locations.detail: The village church, still standing. Father Donavich performs rites here and keeps a door in the floor shut. Behind it: his son Doru, chained and changed. The Morning Lord has been very quiet.

locations.name: Bildrath's Mercantile
locations.title: The Only Shop
locations.detail: Run by Bildrath Cantemir with the specific warmth of a man who has no competition. His nephew Parriwimple stands nearby. The inventory matches its owner. The party left without buying anything.

locations.name: Blood of the Vine Tavern
locations.title: The Only Tavern
locations.detail: The only light in the village at night. Ismark was found here. Three Vistani women — Alenka, Mirabel, Sorbia — were present. Mirabel specifically invited Kaelos to the Vistani camp by the river.

locations.name: Vistani Camp
locations.title: Camp by the River
locations.detail: A Vistani camp west of the village, by the river. Mirabel extended an invitation to Kaelos the night the group arrived in the village — whether out of personal interest or something more deliberate is unknown. The group passed it by without stopping. Madam Eva, the seer who read the cards at The Wayfarer before the group entered Barovia, is likely here.
locations.status: Not visited — passed by in Session 7
locations.region: West of the Village of Barovia, by the river

locations.name: Ravenloft Crossroads
locations.title: The Turn to the Castle
locations.detail: The point where the main road to Vallaki crosses the path that climbs toward Ravenloft. Strahd's black carriage was waiting here — drawn by ordinary horses, its door opening on its own. The group did not go up. The gates to the castle road stood open, guarded by the servant who delivered the dinner invitation.
locations.region: Svalich Road, between the Village of Barovia and Vallaki

locations.name: Castle Ravenloft
locations.title: Strahd's Seat
locations.detail: The castle where Strahd von Zarovich resides. Doru followed a monster hunter here and came back as vampire spawn. The group has now received a formal dinner invitation — three days, safe passage guaranteed, signed by Strahd himself.
locations.region: Central Barovia, on a high spur

locations.name: Vallaki
locations.title: First Destination
locations.detail: A walled town to the west, described as safer than the village. The party has committed to escorting Ireena here. What awaits them inside the walls is not yet known.

locations.name: Krezk
locations.title: The Sanctuary Beyond
locations.detail: A walled village further west and further from the castle than Vallaki. Father Donavich mentioned it as a possible refuge for Ireena — the Abbey of Saint Markovia sits on the hill above the village and was once a place of genuine healing. Whether it still is, he did not say with certainty. The party knows the name and the direction. Nothing more.

locations.name: Amber Temple
locations.title: Where Strahd Found His Power
locations.detail: Ismark mentioned it in passing — a temple somewhere in the mountains where Strahd acquired the powers that made him what he is. Beyond that, the party knows nothing. The temple does not appear on any map they have seen.
locations.status: Known by name only — location unknown
